summary: Tested subscription downgrade flow fix. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (1 skipped - user already on pro plan). Frontend: PricingPage renders correctly with all 3 plan cards, downgrading banner displayed correctly, button states show proper text for pending downgrade scenario.

frontend_tests.pricing_page_load: PASSED - All 3 plan cards rendered correctly
frontend_tests.downgrading_banner: PASSED - Banner shows 'Plan change scheduled - You'll switch to Free at the end of your current billing cycle'
frontend_tests.button_states: PASSED - Free='Switching at cycle end', Plus='Downgrade to Plus', Pro='Downgrading at cycle end'
frontend_tests.current_plan_badge: PASSED - Shows 'Current Plan' badge on Pro card
frontend_tests.pending_badge: PASSED - Shows 'SWITCHING SOON' badge on Free card

code_review_verification.subscription_charged_guard: VERIFIED - Lines 354-355: Only sets 'active' status if subscription_status != 'downgrading'
code_review_verification.subscription_cancelled_pending_activatio: VERIFIED - Lines 388-391: Sets 'pending_activation' status if downgrading to paid plan (Pro→Plus)
code_review_verification.subscription_cancelled_free: VERIFIED - Lines 392-394: Sets status to None if downgrading to free
code_review_verification.frontend_pending_activation_banner: VERIFIED - PricingPage.js lines 296-310: Shows amber banner when subscription_status is 'pending_activation'
code_review_verification.frontend_downgrading_banner: VERIFIED - PricingPage.js lines 311-327: Shows indigo banner when subscription_status is 'downgrading'
code_review_verification.frontend_activate_button: VERIFIED - PricingPage.js lines 52, 56, 69: needsActivation condition enables Activate button

context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription downgrade flow is working correctly. Test user (test@gmail.com) is on Pro plan with downgrading status and pending_plan=free. The Razorpay subscription has been cancelled at cycle end. When the subscription.cancelled webhook fires, the user will switch to free plan. To test the pending_activation flow (Pro→Plus), a different test user on Pro would need to downgrade to Plus. The webhook handler correctly sets pending_activation for paid plan downgrades.
